case_title: MEISENZAHL,RICHARD C. VS MAURILLE,ARTEMIS C. et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,400.00 FILED BY MEISENZAHL,RICHARD C. AS TO DEFENDANT MAURILLE,ARTEMIS C. MAURILLE,MITHRAS C. MAURILLE,ULYSSES C. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-25-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MAURILLE,ARTEMIS C.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MEISENZAHL,RICHARD C. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MAURILLE,ARTEMIS C. MAURILLE,MITHRAS C. MAURILLE,ULYSSES C. $4,400.00 PRINCIPAL, $130.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,530.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT MAURILLE,ARTEMIS C. MAURILLE,MITHRAS C. MAURILLE,ULYSSES C.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT MAURILLE,ARTEMIS C. MAURILLE,MITHRAS C. MAURILLE,ULYSSES C.

WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $20.98 AS TO DEFENDANT MAURILLE,ARTEMIS C. MAURILLE,MITHRAS C. MAURILLE,ULYSSES C.
